== 忌日 == * [[文明]]5年（[[1473年]]_月_日） - [[山名宗全]]（山名持豊）、[[守護大名]]（* [[1404年]]） * 歿年不詳 - [[小野小町]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月18日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[建長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1249年]][[5月2日]]） - [[宝治]]より建長に[[改元]] * [[万延]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1860年]][[4月8日]]） - [[桜田門外の変]]があった為、[[安政]]より万延に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[元亀]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[4月19日]]） - [[土井利勝]]、[[大老]]、下総[[古河藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1644年]]） * [[順治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[5月4日]]） - [[康熙帝]]、[[清]]の4代皇帝（+ [[1722年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[4月15日]]） - [[山名宗全]]（山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]]（* [[1404年]]） <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[柿本人麻呂]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）--> <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[小野小町]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）--> <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[和泉式部]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318}}

== できごと == * [[建長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1249年]][[5月2日]]） - [[宝治]]より建長に[[改元]] * [[万延]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1860年]][[4月8日]]） - [[桜田門外の変]]があった為、[[安政]]より万延に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[元亀]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[4月19日]]） - [[土井利勝]]、[[大老]]、下総[[古河藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1644年]]） * [[順治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[5月4日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（+ [[1722年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[4月15日]]） - [[山名宗全]]（山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]]（* [[1404年]]） <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[柿本人麻呂]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）--> <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[小野小町]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）--> <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[和泉式部]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ_Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:3月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]][[en:3月18日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

== 誕生日 == * [[元亀]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[4月19日]]） - [[土井利勝]]、[[大老]]、下総[[古河藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1644年]]） * [[順治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[5月4日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（+ [[1722年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[4月15日]]） - [[山名宗全]]（山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]]（* [[1404年]]） <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[柿本人麻呂]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）--> <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[小野小町]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）--> <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[和泉式部]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

revision.comment: adding template to the bottom of all of these
idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]"
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
trying to comment out all the bad overview sections I made earlier
adding these as a part 1 of a few steps to get names on the things
Text replacement - "関連項目" to "See Also"
Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Moving from [[Category:友引]] to [[Category:Tomobiki]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
removing all the commented out stuff
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Text replacement - "== 脚注 ==↵{{脚注ヘルプ}}↵{{Reflist}}" to ""
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
Removing from [[Category:New pages most likely u]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding korean to all the dates
Text replacement - "[[ユリウス暦]]" to "[[Julian Calendar]]"
Text replacement - "[[グレゴリオ暦]]" to "[[Gregorian Calendar]]"
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template

[[sn:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] [[zh:三月十八]] [[en:draft:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[建長]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1249]][[5月2日]]） - [[宝治]]より建長に[[改元]] * [[万延]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1860]][[4月8日]]） - [[桜田門外の変]]があった為、[[安政]]より万延に改元
== Births == * [[元亀]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1573]][[4月19日]]） - [[土井利勝]]、[[大老]]、下総[[古河藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1644]]） * [[順治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654]][[5月4日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（+ [[1722]]）
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473]][[4月15日]]） - [[山名宗全]]（山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]]（* [[1404]]）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] [[zh:三月十八]] [[en:draft:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[建長]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1249]][[5月2日]]） - [[宝治]]より建長に[[改元]] * [[万延]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1860]][[4月8日]]） - [[桜田門外の変]]があった為、[[安政]]より万延に改元
== Births == * [[元亀]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[1573]][[4月19日]]） - [[土井利勝]]、[[大老]]、下総[[古河藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1644]]） * [[順治]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1654]][[5月4日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（+ [[1722]]）
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5th year（ユリウス暦[[1473]][[4月15日]]） - [[山名宗全]]（山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]]（* [[1404]]）

[[sn:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] [[zh:三月十八]] [[en:draft:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * [[建長]]1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1249]][[5月2日]]） - [[宝治]]より建長に[[改元]] * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}}1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1860]][[4月8日]]） - [[桜田門外の変]]があった為、{{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}より万延に改元
== Births == * [[元亀]]3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]][[4月19日]]） - [[土井利勝]]、[[大老]]、下総[[古河藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1644]]） * [[順治]]11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]][[5月4日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（+ [[1722]]）
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]][[4月15日]]） - [[山名宗全]]（山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]]（* [[1404]]）
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] [[zh:三月十八]] [[en:draft:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[建長]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[May 2]] ） - [[宝治]] より建長に[[改元]] * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1860]] [[April 8]] ） - [[桜田門外の変]] があった為、{{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} より万延に改元
== Births == * [[元亀]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[April 19]] ） - [[土井利勝]] 、[[大老]] 、下総[[古河藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1644]] ） * [[順治]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[May 4]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代皇帝（+ [[1722]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[April 15]] ） - [[山名宗全]] （山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]] （* [[1404]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318}}

[[sn:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] [[zh:三月十八]] [[en:draft:March 18 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[建長]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[5月2日]] ） - [[宝治]] より建長に[[改元]] * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1860]] [[4月8日]] ） - [[桜田門外の変]] があった為、{{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} より万延に改元
== Births == * [[元亀]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[4月19日]] ） - [[土井利勝]] 、[[大老]] 、下総[[古河藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1644]] ） * [[順治]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[5月4日]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代皇帝（+ [[1722]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[4月15日]] ） - [[山名宗全]] （山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]] （* [[1404]] ）
== Commemorations ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] [[zh:三月十八]] [[en:draft:March 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[建長]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[May 2]] ） - [[宝治]] より建長に[[改元]] * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1860]] [[April 8]] ） - [[桜田門外の変]] があった為、{{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} より万延に改元
== Births == * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[April 19]] ） - [[土井利勝]] 、[[大老]] 、下総[[古河藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1644]] ） * [[順治]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[May 4]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代皇帝（+ [[1722]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[April 15]] ） - [[山名宗全]] （山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]] （* [[1404]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318}}

[[sn:March 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] [[zh:三月十八]] [[en:draft:March 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[建長]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[May 2]] ） - [[宝治]] より建長に[[改元]] * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1860]] [[April 8]] ） - [[桜田門外の変]] があった為、{{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} より万延に改元
== Births == * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[April 19]] ） - [[土井利勝]] 、[[大老]] 、下総[[古河藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1644]] ） * [[順治]] qqth year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[May 4]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代皇帝（+ [[1722]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[April 15]] ） - [[山名宗全]] （山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]] （* [[1404]] ）
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[May 2]] ） - [[宝治]] よりKenchōに[[改元]] * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1860]] [[April 8]] ） - [[桜田門外の変]] があった為、{{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} より万延に改元
== Births == * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[April 19]] ） - [[土井利勝]] 、[[Tairō]] 、下総[[古河藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1644]] ） * [[順治]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[May 4]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[清]] の4代Emperor（+ [[1722]] ）

[[sn:March 18 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 18일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] [[zh:三月十八]] [[en:draft:March 18 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[May 2]] ） - [[宝治]] よりKenchōに[[改元]] * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1860]] [[April 8]] ） - [[桜田門外の変]] があった為、{{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} より万延に改元
== Births == * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[April 19]] ） - [[土井利勝]] 、[[Tairō]] 、下総[[古河藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1644]] ） * [[順治]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[May 4]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（+ [[1722]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[April 15]] ） - [[山名宗全]] （山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]] （* [[1404]] ）

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[May 2]] ） - [[宝治]] よりKenchōに[[改元]] * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延|12=draft}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1860]] [[April 8]] ） - [[桜田門外の変]] があった為、{{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} より万延に改元
== Births == * [[Genki (era)|Genki]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1573]] [[April 19]] ） - [[土井利勝]] 、[[Tairō]] 、下総[[古河藩]] 初代藩主（+ [[1644]] ） * [[順治]] 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[May 4]] ） - [[Kangxi帝]] <ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[Encyclopedia Britannica|Encyclopædia Britannica]] </ref>、[[Qing dynasty]] の4代Emperor（+ [[1722]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[April 15]] ） - [[山名宗全]] （山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]] （* [[1404]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1249]] {{ill|May 2|ja|5月2日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Hōji|ja|宝治}} to {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建長}}. * {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1860]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – Due to the occurrence of the {{ill|Sakuradamon Incident|ja|桜田門外の変}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} to {{ill|Man'en|ja|万延|12=draft}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genki (era)|ja|元亨}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1573]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Doi Toshikatsu|ja|土井利勝}}, Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died [[1644]]). * [[Shunji]] 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1654]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日}}) – {{ill|Kangxi Emperor|ja|康熙帝}}, the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died [[1722]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunmei|ja|文明}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1473]] {{ill|April 15|ja|4月15日}}) – {{ill|Yamana Sōzen|ja|山名宗全}} (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born [[1404]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月18日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の18日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[建長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1249年]][[5月2日]]） - [[宝治]]より建長に[[改元]] * [[万延]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1860年]][[4月8日]]） - [[桜田門外の変]]があった為、[[安政]]より万延に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[元亀]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[4月19日]]） - [[土井利勝]]、[[大老]]、下総[[古河藩]]初代藩主（+ [[1644年]]） * [[順治]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1654年]][[5月4日]]） - [[康熙帝]]<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Kangxi Kangxi emperor of Qing dynasty] [[ブリタニカ百科事典|Encyclopædia Britannica]]</ref>、[[清]]の4代皇帝（+ [[1722年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[4月15日]]） - [[山名宗全]]（山名持豊）<ref>『東寺執行日記』には「死去は18日なり。16日に大事にて、18日治定か」とある。川岡、P144 - P145。</ref>、[[守護大名]]（* [[1404年]]） <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[柿本人麻呂]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）--> <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[小野小町]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）--> <!--* 歿年不詳 - [[和泉式部]]、[[歌人]]（生年不詳）-->
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|March 18|qq=March 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Hōji (era)|Hōji]] to [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]]. * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the occurrence of the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|Sakuradamon Incident]], the era name was changed from [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] to [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]].
== Births == * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Doi Toshikatsu|Doi Toshikatsu]], Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died [[:en:1644|1644]]). * [[Shunji]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – [[:en:Kangxi Emperor|Kangxi Emperor]], the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died [[:en:1722|1722]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – [[:en:Yamana Sōzen|Yamana Sōzen]] (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born [[:en:1404|1404]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十八]]

== Events == * [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Hōji (era)|Hōji]] to [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]]. * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the occurrence of the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|Sakuradamon Incident]], the era name was changed from [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] to [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]].
== Births == * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Doi Toshikatsu|Doi Toshikatsu]], Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died [[:en:1644|1644]]). * [[:en:Shunji|Shunji]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – [[:en:Kangxi Emperor|Kangxi Emperor]], the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died [[:en:1722|1722]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – [[:en:Yamana Sōzen|Yamana Sōzen]] (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born [[:en:1404|1404]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Hōji (era)|Hōji]] to [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]]. * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the occurrence of the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|Sakuradamon Incident]], the era name was changed from [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] to [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]].
== Births == * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Doi Toshikatsu|Doi Toshikatsu]], Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died [[:en:1644|1644]]). * [[:en:Shunji|Shunji]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – [[:en:Kangxi Emperor|Kangxi Emperor]], the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died [[:en:1722|1722]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – [[:en:Yamana Sōzen|Yamana Sōzen]] (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born [[:en:1404|1404]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Hōji (era)|Hōji]] to [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]]. * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the occurrence of the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|Sakuradamon Incident]], the era name was changed from [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] to [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]].
== Births == * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Doi Toshikatsu|Doi Toshikatsu]], Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died [[:en:1644|1644]]). * [[:en:Shunji|Shunji]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – [[:en:Kangxi Emperor|Kangxi Emperor]], the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died [[:en:1722|1722]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – [[:en:Yamana Sōzen|Yamana Sōzen]] (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born [[:en:1404|1404]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318|qq=}}

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十八]][[zh:三月十八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839110]] Wikidata name: 18th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 18|qq=March 18}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Hōji (era)|Hōji]] to [[:en:Kenchō|Kenchō]]. * [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the occurrence of the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|Sakuradamon Incident]], the era name was changed from [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] to [[:en:Man'en|Man'en]].
== Births == * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Doi Toshikatsu|Doi Toshikatsu]], Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died [[:en:1644|1644]]). * [[:en:Shunji|Shunji]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – [[:en:Kangxi Emperor|Kangxi Emperor]], the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died [[:en:1722|1722]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – [[:en:Yamana Sōzen|Yamana Sōzen]] (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born [[:en:1404|1404]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki (era)]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Doi Toshikatsu|Doi Toshikatsu]], Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died [[:en:1644|1644]]). * [[:en:Shunji|Shunji]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – [[:en:Kangxi Emperor|Kangxi Emperor]], the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died [[:en:1722|1722]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] [[:en:April 15|April 15]]) – [[:en:Yamana Sōzen|Yamana Sōzen]] (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born [[:en:1404|1404]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kenchō|en|Kenchō|WD=Q1194270|lt=Kenchō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1249|en|1249|WD=Q5485|lt=1249}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Hōji (era)|en|Hōji (era)|WD=Q1327400|lt=Hōji}} to {{ill|Kenchō|en|Kenchō|WD=Q1194270|lt=Kenchō}}. * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|WD=Q1193862|lt=Man'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|WD=Q7691|lt=1860}} {{ill|April 8|en|April 8|WD=Q2503|lt=April 8}}) – Due to the occurrence of the {{ill|Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|en|Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|WD=Q46603|lt=Sakuradamon Incident}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} to {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|WD=Q1193862|lt=Man'en}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – {{ill|Doi Toshikatsu|en|Doi Toshikatsu|WD=Q1042428|lt=Doi Toshikatsu}}, Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}}). * {{ill|Shunji|en|Shunji|WD=Q7505077|lt=Shunji}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|WD=Q2549|lt=May 4}}) – {{ill|Kangxi Emperor|en|Kangxi Emperor|WD=Q17790|lt=Kangxi Emperor}}, the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|WD=Q8432|lt=Bunmei}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1473|en|1473|WD=Q6594|lt=1473}} {{ill|April 15|en|April 15|WD=Q2497|lt=April 15}}) – {{ill|Yamana Sōzen|en|Yamana Sōzen|WD=Q1355689|lt=Yamana Sōzen}} (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born {{ill|1404|en|1404|WD=Q6121|lt=1404}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|17|3|19|2|19|4|3|0318|qq=}}

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kenchō|en|Kenchō|WD=Q1194270|lt=Kenchō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1249|en|1249|WD=Q5485|lt=1249}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Hōji (era)|en|Hōji (era)|WD=Q1327400|lt=Hōji}} to {{ill|Kenchō|en|Kenchō|WD=Q1194270|lt=Kenchō}}. * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|WD=Q1193862|lt=Man'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|WD=Q7691|lt=1860}} {{ill|April 8|en|April 8|WD=Q2503|lt=April 8}}) – Due to the occurrence of the {{ill|Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|en|Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|WD=Q46603|lt=Sakuradamon Incident}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} to {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|WD=Q1193862|lt=Man'en}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – {{ill|Doi Toshikatsu|en|Doi Toshikatsu|WD=Q1042428|lt=Doi Toshikatsu}}, Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644}}). * {{ill|Shunji|en|Shunji|WD=Q7505077|lt=Shunji}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|WD=Q2549|lt=May 4}}) – {{ill|Kangxi Emperor|en|Kangxi Emperor|WD=Q17790|lt=Kangxi Emperor}}, the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|WD=Q8432|lt=Bunmei}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1473|en|1473|WD=Q6594|lt=1473}} {{ill|April 15|en|April 15|WD=Q2497|lt=April 15}}) – {{ill|Yamana Sōzen|en|Yamana Sōzen|WD=Q1355689|lt=Yamana Sōzen}} (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born {{ill|1404|en|1404|WD=Q6121|lt=1404}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Kenchō|en|Kenchō|WD=Q1194270|lt=Kenchō|1=Kenchō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1249|en|1249|WD=Q5485|lt=1249|1=1249}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2|1=May 2}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Hōji (era)|en|Hōji (era)|WD=Q1327400|lt=Hōji|1=Hōji (era)}} to {{ill|Kenchō|en|Kenchō|WD=Q1194270|lt=Kenchō|1=Kenchō}}. * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|WD=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|WD=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} {{ill|April 8|en|April 8|WD=Q2503|lt=April 8|1=April 8}}) – Due to the occurrence of the {{ill|Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|en|Sakuradamon Incident (1860)|WD=Q46603|lt=Sakuradamon Incident|1=Sakuradamon Incident (1860)}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} to {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|WD=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19|1=April 19}}) – {{ill|Doi Toshikatsu|en|Doi Toshikatsu|WD=Q1042428|lt=Doi Toshikatsu|1=Doi Toshikatsu}}, Tairō and the first daimyō of the Furukawa Domain in Kazusa (died {{ill|1644|en|1644|WD=Q6920|lt=1644|1=1644}}). * {{ill|Shunji|en|Shunji|WD=Q7505077|lt=Shunji|1=Shunji}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654|1=1654}} {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|WD=Q2549|lt=May 4|1=May 4}}) – {{ill|Kangxi Emperor|en|Kangxi Emperor|WD=Q17790|lt=Kangxi Emperor|1=Kangxi Emperor}}, the 4th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722|1=1722}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|WD=Q8432|lt=Bunmei|1=Civilization}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1473|en|1473|WD=Q6594|lt=1473|1=1473}} {{ill|April 15|en|April 15|WD=Q2497|lt=April 15|1=April 15}}) – {{ill|Yamana Sōzen|en|Yamana Sōzen|WD=Q1355689|lt=Yamana Sōzen|1=Yamana Sōzen}} (also known as Yamana Mochitoyo) – a regional warlord (born {{ill|1404|en|1404|WD=Q6121|lt=1404|1=1404}}).
